[Command: cat Skills/frontend/templates/warm-consulting.yaml | head -50]
# Warm Consulting Landing Page Template
# Professional yet approachable style for B2B services

---
# TEMPLATE METADATA

name: warm-consulting
description: |
  Professional consulting/agency template with warm stone tones and amber accents.
  Creates trust through restraint while remaining approachable. Ideal for 
  B2B services, consulting firms, agencies, and professional practices
  that want to feel established without being cold or corporate.

source: |
  Captured from GTM consulting landing page generated for Launchpoint.
  Combines the credibility of minimal-saas with warmer, more human tones
  that work well for service businesses where relationships matter.

created: 2026-02-06

---
# COLOR PALETTE

palette:
  primary: "#1c1917"      # Stone-900 - primary text, key buttons
  secondary: "#57534e"    # Stone-600 - secondary text, descriptions
  accent: "#d97706"       # Amber-600 - icons, highlights, stage markers
  background: "#fafaf9"   # Stone-50 - main page background
  surface: "#ffffff"      # White - cards, elevated sections
  text: "#1c1917"         # Stone-900 - body text
  text_muted: "#a8a29e"   # Stone-400 - subtle text, metadata

---
# TYPOGRAPHY

typography:
  heading_font: "system-ui"
  body_font: "system-ui"
  scale: normal
  heading_weight: 600

---
# LAYOUT SETTINGS

layout:
  max_width: standard     # max-w-5xl (1024px)
  spacing: balanced       # Generous but not excessive
  border_radius: subtle   # rounded-md (6px) for buttons, rounded-lg (8px) for cards

---","stderr":"","returncode":0},"tool_call_id":"toolu_01N12XhmvxtoHjwPWbrQp3M3","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-06T21:26:09.148947Z","part_kind":"tool-return"},{"tool_name":"list_space_routes","content":[{"path":"/","route_type":"page","public":true},{"path":"/sketches","route_type":"page","public":true},{"path":"/sketches/view","route_type":"page","public":true},{"path":"/frontend-test","route_type":"page","public":true}],"tool_call_id":"toolu_01FppURfjwnLDKNSrBBTmsNW","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-06T21:26:08.956475Z","part_kind":"tool-return"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
